🍪 Cookie Notice

We use cookies for analytics and to serve relevant ads via Google AdSense. By clicking "Accept", you consent to our use of cookies. Learn more

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 9, 2026

1. Overview

GenAIPick ("I", "me", or "the site") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what information I collect, how I use it, and your rights regarding your data when you visit genaipick.com.

This is an independent review site. I personally test and review AI tools and provide honest opinions. Your privacy matters to me as much as honest reviews do.

2. Information I Collect

2.1 Information You Do NOT Provide

I do not collect:

  • Personal identification (name, email, address) — unless you contact me directly
  • Payment information
  • Account credentials

2.2 Automatically Collected Information

Like most websites, some information is automatically collected:

  • Usage Data: Pages visited, time on site, referral sources
  • Device Data: Browser type, operating system, screen size
  • IP Address: Anonymized for geolocation analytics

This information is collected via Google Analytics (GA4) and is aggregated and anonymized.

2.3 Contact Form Data

If you contact me via the contact form or email, I receive your name, email address, and message. This information is used only to respond to your inquiry and is not shared with third parties.

3. How I Use Information

I use automatically collected data for:

  • Content Improvement: Understanding which reviews and articles are most helpful to readers
  • Performance: Monitoring site speed and identifying technical issues
  • Advertising: Displaying relevant ads through Google AdSense to support the site's operation

I do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information with third parties.

4. Cookies

4.1 Essential Cookies

  • Theme Preference: Remembers your dark/light mode choice (localStorage)
  • Cookie Consent: Remembers whether you accepted cookies (localStorage)

4.2 Analytics Cookies (Google Analytics)

Google Analytics sets the following cookies:

  • _ga — Distinguishes users (2-year expiry)
  • _ga_<container-id> — Persists session state (2-year expiry)

These cookies do not contain personally identifiable information. Learn more: Google Privacy Policy.

4.3 Advertising Cookies (Google AdSense)

Google AdSense uses cookies to serve personalized ads:

  • Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits
  • Google's advertising cookies enable interest-based advertising
  • You can opt out at Google Ads Settings or www.aboutads.info

4.4 Managing Cookies

You can control cookies through your browser settings: delete existing cookies, block third-party cookies, or use private/incognito mode. Note that disabling cookies may affect some website functions.

5. Third-Party Services

ServicePurposePrivacy Policy
Google Analytics (GA4)Anonymous traffic analyticsLink
Google AdSenseDisplay advertisingLink
CloudflareHosting, CDN, securityLink

6. Affiliate Disclosure

Some links on GenAIPick are affiliate links. If you click through and make a purchase, I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. This does not affect my reviews — I recommend tools I genuinely use and believe in. Affiliate relationships are disclosed in relevant articles.

7. Data Retention

Google Analytics data is retained for a maximum of 26 months. Contact form messages are kept only as long as needed to respond to your inquiry. I do not independently store visitor data on my servers.

8. Your Rights

8.1 GDPR (EEA & UK)

Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict processing of, and port your personal data. You also have the right to object to processing. To exercise these rights, contact me at hello@genaipick.com.

8.2 CCPA (California)

California residents have the right to know what data is collected, request deletion, and opt out of data selling (I do not sell data). Contact me to exercise these rights.

9. Children's Privacy

GenAIPick is not directed at children under 13 (or 16 in certain EU countries). I do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided personal data, contact me and I will delete it promptly.

10. International Data Transfers

Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries with different data protection laws. I take appropriate measures to ensure your data remains protected.

11. Changes to This Policy

I may update this privacy policy to reflect changes in practices or legal requirements. The "Last updated" date indicates when changes were made. Please review periodically.

12. Contact

For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, contact me at:

  • Email: hello@genaipick.com
  • Contact Page: Contact Form

I aim to respond to all inquiries within 30 days.
